# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'PROJECT_TYPE',
            choices: ['maven', 'gradle', 'npm', 'python', 'custom'],
            description: 'Select the project type'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'BUILD_ACTION',
            choices: ['build', 'test', 'deploy', 'build-and-test', 'full-pipeline'],
            description: 'Select the build action to perform'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['dev', 'staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target environment for deployment'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'RUN_TESTS',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Run test suite'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_QUALITY_CHECKS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip code quality checks'
        )
        string(
            name: 'BUILD_ARGS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Additional build arguments (alphanumeric, spaces, hyphens, underscores only)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TEST_SUITE',
            defaultValue: 'all',
            description: 'Test suite to run (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores only)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_TARGET',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Deployment target (alphanumeric, dots, hyphens, underscores only)'
        )
    }
    
    environment {
        ALLOWED_PROJECT_TYPES = 'maven,gradle,npm,python,custom'
        ALLOWED_BUILD_ACTIONS = 'build,test,deploy,build-and-test,full-pipeline'
        ALLOWED_ENVIRONMENTS = 'dev,staging,production'
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    validateParameters()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Setup') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Project Type: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
                    echo "Build Action: ${params.BUILD_ACTION}"
                    echo "Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}"
                    echo "Run Tests: ${params.RUN_TESTS}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            when {
                expression { 
                    params.BUILD_ACTION in ['build', 'build-and-test', 'full-pipeline']
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeBuild()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { 
                    params.RUN_TESTS && params.BUILD_ACTION in ['test', 'build-and-test', 'full-pipeline']
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeTests()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Quality Checks') {
            when {
                expression { 
                    !params.SKIP_QUALITY_CHECKS && params.BUILD_ACTION in ['build-and-test', 'full-pipeline']
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeQualityChecks()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { 
                    params.BUILD_ACTION in ['deploy', 'full-pipeline']
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeDeploy()
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo 'Pipeline completed successfully!'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Pipeline failed!'
        }
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}

def validateParameters() {
    if (!env.ALLOWED_PROJECT_TYPES.split(',').contains(params.PROJECT_TYPE)) {
        error("Invalid PROJECT_TYPE: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}")
    }
    
    if (!env.ALLOWED_BUILD_ACTIONS.split(',').contains(params.BUILD_ACTION)) {
        error("Invalid BUILD_ACTION: ${params.BUILD_ACTION}")
    }
    
    if (!env.ALLOWED_ENVIRONMENTS.split(',').contains(params.ENVIRONMENT)) {
        error("Invalid ENVIRONMENT: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}")
    }
    
    if (params.BUILD_ARGS && !params.BUILD_ARGS.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9\\s._-]*$')) {
        error("Invalid BUILD_ARGS: contains disallowed characters")
    }
    
    if (params.TEST_SUITE && !params.TEST_SUITE.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]*$')) {
        error("Invalid TEST_SUITE: contains disallowed characters")
    }
    
    if (params.DEPLOY_TARGET && !params.DEPLOY_TARGET.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]*$')) {
        error("Invalid DEPLOY_TARGET: contains disallowed characters")
    }
    
    echo "All parameters validated successfully"
}

def executeBuild() {
    def sanitizedBuildArgs = params.BUILD_ARGS.replaceAll('[^a-zA-Z0-9\\s._-]', '')
    
    switch(params.PROJECT_TYPE) {
        case 'maven':
            def mvnGoals = 'clean package'
            if (sanitizedBuildArgs) {
                sh "mvn ${mvnGoals} ${sanitizedBuildArgs}"
            } else {
                sh "mvn ${mvnGoals}"
            }
            break
            
        case 'gradle':
            def gradleTasks = 'clean build'
            if (sanitizedBuildArgs) {
                sh "./gradlew ${gradleTasks} ${sanitizedBuildArgs}"
            } else {
                sh "./gradlew ${gradleTasks}"
            }
            break
            
        case 'npm':
            sh 'npm install'
            if (sanitizedBuildArgs) {
                sh "npm run build -- ${sanitizedBuildArgs}"
            } else {
                sh 'npm run build'
            }
            break
            
        case 'python':
            sh 'pip install -r requirements.txt'
            if (sanitizedBuildArgs) {
                sh "python setup.py build ${sanitizedBuildArgs}"
            } else {
                sh 'python setup.py build'
            }
            break
            
        case 'custom':
            if (fileExists('build.sh')) {
                sh 'chmod +x build.sh'
                if (sanitizedBuildArgs) {
                    sh "./build.sh ${sanitizedBuildArgs}"
                } else {
                    sh './build.sh'
                }
            } else {
                echo 'No build.sh found, skipping custom build'
            }
            break
            
        default:
            error("Unsupported project type: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}")
    }
}

def executeTests() {
    def sanitizedTestSuite = params.TEST_SUITE.replaceAll('[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]', '')
    
    switch(params.PROJECT_TYPE) {
        case 'maven':
            if (sanitizedTestSuite && sanitizedTestSuite != 'all') {
                sh "mvn test -Dtest=${sanitizedTestSuite}"
            } else {
                sh 'mvn test'
            }
            break
            
        case 'gradle':
            if (sanitizedTestSuite && sanitizedTestSuite != 'all') {
                sh "./gradlew test --tests ${sanitizedTestSuite}"
            } else {
                sh './gradlew test'
            }
            break
            
        case 'npm':
            if (sanitizedTestSuite && sanitizedTestSuite != 'all') {
                sh "npm test -- ${sanitizedTestSuite}"
            } else {
                sh 'npm test'
            }
            break
            
        case 'python':
            if (sanitizedTestSuite && sanitizedTestSuite != 'all') {
                sh "pytest tests/${sanitizedTestSuite}"
            } else {
                sh 'pytest tests/'
            }
            break
            
        case 'custom':
            if (fileExists('test.sh')) {
                sh 'chmod +x test.sh'
                if (sanitizedTestSuite && sanitizedTestSuite != 'all') {
                    sh "./test.sh ${sanitizedTestSuite}"
                } else {
                    sh './test.sh'
                }
            } else {
                echo 'No test.sh found, skipping custom tests'
            }
            break
            
        default:
            error("Unsupported project type: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}")
    }
}

def executeQualityChecks() {
    switch(params.PROJECT_TYPE) {
        case 'maven':
            sh 'mvn checkstyle:check pmd:check'
            break
            
        case 'gradle':
            sh './gradlew check'
            break
            
        case 'npm':
            if (fileExists('package.json')) {
                def packageJson = readJSON file: 'package.json'
                if (packageJson.scripts?.lint) {
                    sh 'npm run lint'
                }
            }
            break
            
        case 'python':
            sh 'pip install pylint flake8'
            sh 'pylint **/*.py || true'
            sh 'flake8 . || true'
            break
            
        case 'custom':
            if (fileExists('quality.sh')) {
                sh 'chmod +x quality.sh'
                sh './quality.sh'
            } else {
                echo 'No quality.sh found, skipping quality checks'
            }
            break
            
        default:
            echo "No quality checks configured for ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
    }
}

def executeDeploy() {
    def sanitizedDeployTarget = params.DEPLOY_TARGET.replaceAll('[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]', '')
    def environment = params.ENVIRONMENT
    
    if (!env.ALLOWED_ENVIRONMENTS.split(',').contains(environment)) {
        error("Invalid deployment environment: ${environment}")
    }
    
    echo "Deploying to ${environment} environment"
    
    switch(params.PROJECT_TYPE) {
        case 'maven':
            if (sanitizedDeployTarget) {
                sh "mvn deploy -DaltDeploymentRepository=${sanitizedDeployTarget} -Denvironment=${environment}"
            } else {
                sh "mvn deploy -Denvironment=${environment}"
            }
            break
            
        case 'gradle':
            if (sanitizedDeployTarget) {
                sh "./gradlew publish -Ptarget=${sanitizedDeployTarget} -Penvironment=${environment}"
            } else {
                sh "./gradlew publish -Penvironment=${environment}"
            }
            break
            
        case 'npm':
            if (sanitizedDeployTarget) {
                sh "npm publish --registry=${sanitizedDeployTarget}"
            } else {
                sh 'npm publish'
            }
            break
            
        case 'python':
            if (sanitizedDeployTarget) {
                sh "twine upload dist/* --repository-url ${sanitizedDeployTarget}"
            } else {
                sh 'twine upload dist/*'
            }
            break
            
        case 'custom':
            if (fileExists('deploy.sh')) {
                sh 'chmod +x deploy.sh'
                if (sanitizedDeployTarget) {
                    sh "./deploy.sh ${environment} ${sanitizedDeployTarget}"
                } else {
                    sh "./deploy.sh ${environment}"
                }
            } else {
                error('No deploy.sh found for custom deployment')
            }
            break
            
        default:
            error("Unsupported project type for deployment: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}")
    }
}
